headline: Jensen Huang's Blue-Collar Millionaire Prediction Lifted Quanta Services' Backlog to $48 Billion
summary: Jensen Huang says the AI bottleneck isn't chips, it's skilled workers, and one infrastructure company may be perfectly positioned to profit.
